mapper.select: select * from public.surf_fc_tab where station = #{params.station} and datatime = #{params.dataTime} and validdate >= #{params.startDateTime}
select distinct(datatime) from public.surf_fc_datatime_tab order by datatime desc
SELECT station_id_d as station FROM public.station_info_tab where enabled = 0
SELECT station_id_d as station FROM public.station_info_tab_zj where enabled = 0
SELECT station_id_d as station FROM public.station_info_tab where zone = #{params.zone} or zone2 = #{params.zone}
SELECT station_id_d as station FROM public.station_info_tab where zone3 = #{params.zone}
SELECT station_id_d as station, lon, lat FROM public.station_info_tab
select datatime, filepath from ${params.tableName} where datatime = #{params.dataTime}
select station from public.station_check_value_tab where datatime = #{dataTime} and station = #{station} and datasource = #{dataSource} and hour = #{hour}
mapper.insert: insert into public.station_check_value_tab (station, dataTime, inserttime, dataSource, hour, zone, zone2, atmae24, atrsme24, atcorr24, atrate24, atmaxmae24, atmaxrsme24, atmaxcorr24, #{station} and datasource = #{dataSource} and hour = #{hour}

update public.station_check_value_tab set station = #{station}, dataTime = #{dataTime}, inserttime = #{inserttime}, dataSource = #{dataSource}, hour = #{hour}, zone = #{zone}, zone2 = #{zone2}, rain24h24 = #{rain24h24}, rain24tn24 = #{rain24tn24}, rain24m24 = #{rain24m24}, rain24f24 = #{rain24f24}, rain24h48 = #{rain24h48}, rain24tn48 = #{rain24tn48}, rain24m48 = #{rain24m48}, rain24f48 = #{rain24f48}, rain24h72 = #{rain24h72}, rain24tn72 = #{rain24tn72}, rain24m72 = #{rain24m72}, rain24f72 = #{rain24f72}, rain24h96 = #{rain24h96}, rain24tn96 = #{rain24tn96}, rain24m96 = #{rain24m96}, rain24f96 = #{rain24f96}, rain24h120 = #{rain24h120}, rain24tn120 = #{rain24tn120}, rain24m120 = #{rain24m120}, rain24f120 = #{rain24f120}, rain24h144 = #{rain24h144}, rain24tn144 = #{rain24tn144}, rain24m144 = #{rain24m144}, rain24f144 = #{rain24f144}, rain24h168 = #{rain24h168}, rain24tn168 = #{rain24tn168}, rain24m168 = #{rain24m168}, rain24f168 = #{rain24f168}, rain24h192 = #{rain24h192}, rain24tn192 = #{rain24tn192}, rain24m192 = #{rain24m192}, rain24f192 = #{rain24f192}, rain24h216 = #{rain24h216}, rain24tn216 = #{rain24tn216}, rain24m216 = #{rain24m216}, rain24f216 = #{rain24f216}, rain24h240 = #{rain24h240}, rain24tn240 = #{rain24tn240}, rain24m240 = #{rain24m240}, rain24f240 = #{rain24f240} where datatime = #{dataTime} and station = #{station} and datasource = #{dataSource} and hour = #{hour}
mapper.select: select * from station_check_value_tab where datatime >= #{startTime} and datatime <= #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into public.station_check_value_month_tab (station, dataTime, inserttime, dataSource, hour, zone, zone2, #{rain24tn48}, rain24m48 = #{rain24m48}, rain24f48 = #{rain24f48}, rain24h72 = #{rain24h72}, rain24tn72 = #{rain24tn72}, rain24m72 = #{rain24m72}, rain24f72 = #{rain24f72}, rain24h96 = #{rain24h96}, rain24tn96 = #{rain24tn96}, rain24m96 = #{rain24m96}, rain24f96 = #{rain24f96}, rain24h120 = #{rain24h120}, rain24tn120 = #{rain24tn120}, rain24m120 = #{rain24m120}, rain24f120 = #{rain24f120}, rain24h144 = #{rain24h144}, rain24tn144 = #{rain24tn144}, rain24m144 = #{rain24m144}, rain24f144 = #{rain24f144}, rain24h168 = #{rain24h168}, rain24tn168 = #{rain24tn168}, rain24m168 = #{rain24m168}, rain24f168 = #{rain24f168}, rain24h192 = #{rain24h192}, rain24tn192 = #{rain24tn192}, rain24m192 = #{rain24m192}, rain24f192 = #{rain24f192}, rain24h216 = #{rain24h216}, rain24tn216 = #{rain24tn216}, rain24m216 = #{rain24m216}, rain24f216 = #{rain24f216}, rain24h240 = #{rain24h240}, rain24tn240 = #{rain24tn240}, rain24m240 = #{rain24m240}, rain24f240 = #{rain24f240}
mapper.select: select * from grib_check_value_tab where datatime >= #{startTime} and datatime <= #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into public.grib_check_value_month_tab (station, dataTime, inserttime, dataSource, hour, zone, zone2, rain24h24,rain24tn24,rain24m24,rain24f24, rain24h48,rain24tn48,rain24m48,rain24f48, rain24h72,rain24tn72,rain24m72,rain24f72, rain24h96,rain24tn96,rain24m96,rain24f96, rain24h120,rain24tn120,rain24m120,rain24f120, rain24h144,rain24tn144,rain24m144,rain24f144, rain24h168,rain24tn168,rain24m168,rain24f168, rain24h192,rain24tn192,rain24m192,rain24f192, rain24h216,rain24tn216,rain24m216,rain24f216, rain24h240,rain24tn240,rain24m240,rain24f240) values( #{station}, #{dataTime}, #{inserttime}, #{dataSource}, #{hour}, #{zone}, #{zone2}, #{rain24h24},#{rain24tn24},#{rain24m24},#{rain24f24}, #{rain24h48},#{rain24tn48},#{rain24m48},#{rain24f48}, #{rain24h72},#{rain24tn72},#{rain24m72},#{rain24f72}, #{rain24h96},#{rain24tn96},#{rain24m96},#{rain24f96}, #{rain24h120},#{rain24tn120},#{rain24m120},#{rain24f120}, #{rain24h144},#{rain24tn144},#{rain24m144},#{rain24f144}, #{rain24h168},#{rain24tn168},#{rain24m168},#{rain24f168}, #{rain24h192},#{rain24tn192},#{rain24m192},#{rain24f192}, #{rain24h216},#{rain24tn216},#{rain24m216},#{rain24f216}, #{rain24h240},#{rain24tn240},#{rain24m240},#{rain24f240}) on conflict (station,dataTime,hour,dataSource) do update set inserttime = #{inserttime}, rain24h24 = #{rain24h24}, rain24tn24 = #{rain24tn24}, rain24m24 = #{rain24m24}, rain24f24 = #{rain24f24}, rain24h48 = #{rain24h48}, rain24tn48 = #{rain24tn48}, rain24m48 = #{rain24m48}, rain24f48 = #{rain24f48}, rain24h72 = #{rain24h72}, rain24tn72 = #{rain24tn72}, rain24m72 = #{rain24m72}, rain24f72 = #{rain24f72}, rain24f120 = #{rain24f120}, rain24h144 = #{rain24h144}, rain24tn144 = #{rain24tn144}, rain24m144 = #{rain24m144}, rain24f144 = #{rain24f144}, rain24h168 = #{rain24h168}, rain24tn168 = #{rain24tn168}, rain24m168 = #{rain24m168}, rain24f168 = #{rain24f168}, rain24h192 = #{rain24h192}, rain24tn192 = #{rain24tn192}, rain24m192 = #{rain24m192}, rain24f192 = #{rain24f192}, rain24h216 = #{rain24h216}, rain24tn216 = #{rain24tn216}, rain24m216 = #{rain24m216}, rain24f216 = #{rain24f216}, rain24h240 = #{rain24h240}, rain24tn240 = #{rain24tn240}, rain24m240 = #{rain24m240}, rain24f240 = #{rain24f240}
